name: Roast Loin of Venison with Savory Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Loin of venison, with bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix olive oil, chopped carrots, celery, onion, minced garlic, fresh thyme, and bay leaves.
3. Rub this mixture over the venison, ensuring it is well coated.
4. Place the seasoned venison in an oven-safe dish.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add clarified butter on top of the venison.
7. Cover the dish tightly with aluminum foil.
8. Roast in the preheated oven for 2 hours or until the internal temperature reaches your desired level of doneness.
9. Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
